title: Disable negative values & trackpad scrolling in numbers field

posts.author: gianlucasparks (Gianluca Semeraro)
posts.cookedHtml:
This feature in the numbers field is really annoying some customers and our data team because, it makes people put negative values inside a numbers field.

I think it’s an easy feature to be able to disable.
It should be a minimum to be able to do that.

Happy to hear what you´ll think

posts.author: Sorenb86 (Søren Bonde)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree. I see why they need to do it (i think is accessability reasons from EU) but it really is ruining our workflow aswell as people by mistake scroll and change a critical number. i agree that if you could disable it, it would be great.
